title: [v4.6] systests: quadlet: fixes for RHEL8
body:
Some quadlet tests are failing on RHEL8: test code was using journalctl to check output from containers. This fails on RHEL8, where default log driver is k8s-file.

Solution: use 'podman logs' instead. To do so, we need to keep the containers alive (otherwise, quadlet seems to delete them on exit). Do so by running 'top -b' (batch); the currently-used 'top' was failing because not-a-tty.

Cherry-pick of #19276, one minor conflict resolved.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

```release-note
None
```
